title: Piedmont Natural Gas lowers rates; average N.C. residential customer to save approximately $176 per year compared to August 2022 rates
text: Latest decrease, due to lower projected demand costs, will be reflected beginning with customers' August 2023 bills Multiple drops in benchmark cost of natural gas earlier this year contribute to annual residential customer savings Video here: Understand how your natural gas bill works and what factors influence your monthly bill CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Piedmont Natural Gas received approval from the North Carolina Utilities Commission to reduce residential customer billing rates due to updated annual demand projections, to be reflected beginning with customers' August 2023 bills.

title: US Launches Its First Nuclear Reactor Built From Scratch in Decades
text: The first nuclear reactor built from scratch in the U.S. in decades has entered operation at a power plant in Georgia, which could present opportunities for the nuclear industry and investors.

title: 3 Attractive Utilities Stocks to Snap Up Right Now
text: Utilities companies are essential service providers, offering electricity, natural gas, and water to homes and businesses in the U.S. As heavily regulated entities, they are stable investments with slow but steady growth and reliable dividends. Here are three attractive utilities stocks to consider for your portfolio, categorized by market capitalization.

title: Duke Energy's focus on affordability grows, surpassing $70 million in aid to customers, communities since 2021
text: More than $14.5 million to Share the Light Fund® to help low-income customers with bill pay assistance Over $40.4 million invested in energy efficiency programs Launching new program to assist seniors with critical home repairs CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy and its Foundation are marking the milestone of investing more than $70 million since the beginning of 2021 to support nonprofits and other programs dedicated to help those in need.

title: Duke Energy offers programs to help customers with high summer energy bills
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As summer temperatures start to rise, Duke Energy is reminding customers to check out the latest assistance programs that can help keep bills in check.

text: GREENVILLE, S.C. , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy is reminding customers to check out the latest assistance programs that can help keep bills in check as the heat of summer settles in across the Palmetto State.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) Signs 199MW Solar Power Deal in Indiana
text: Duke Energy's (DUK) recent solar purchase agreement with Ranger Power will provide low-cost, reliable and clean energy to its Indiana customers.

title: Duke Energy gives $170,000 in grants to support Indiana communities devastated by storms
text: PLAINFIELD, Ind. , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $170,000 in grants to nonprofit organizations providing support for those impacted by devastating storms that moved across Indiana in late June and early July.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) Rewards Shareholders With 2% Dividend Hike

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio - Q2 2023 Summary

This is part of being transparent with my readers, so they can see what I hold and its correlation with my writing. This article summarizes Q2 of 2023 and focuses on goals, current holdings, allocation, sales, and buys.

title: Duke Energy announces dividend payments to shareholders
text: Company increases quarterly dividend payment for common stock CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) today declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $1.025 per share, an increase of $0.02.

title: Duke Energy Is Still Worth Buying
text: Duke Energy plans to achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2050. They plan on investing $56B into renewable energy and grid infrastructure over the next decade. Since 2013 annual revenue has risen by 27.83%, while operating income has risen by 23.48%. When faced with the uncertainty of the future energy market, Duke Energy's increasingly diverse portfolio gives them an adaptability advantage.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) Unveils Kentucky's Biggest Rooftop Solar Farm
text: Duke Energy's (DUK) introduces a new rooftop solar project with 2MW generation capacity, which will supply solar power to its customers in Kentucky.

title: Duke Energy unveils Kentucky's largest utility-scale rooftop solar site at Amazon Air Hub
text: Project joins the company's other three solar facilities in Northern Kentucky's Kenton and Grant counties More than 5,600 solar panels designed to generate approximately 2 megawatts of clean electricity CINCINNATI , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy customers in Northern Kentucky are benefiting from additional clean, renewable solar energy as a result of a new utility-scale rooftop solar project now generating power for area homes and businesses.   Kentucky's largest rooftop solar array operates over 5,600 photovoltaic panels on the 800,000-square-foot Amazon Air Hub rooftop adjacent to the Cincinnati/Northern Kentucky International Airport.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) to Divest Commercial DG Business for $364M
text: Duke Energy's (DUK) plan to divest its commercial distributed generation business is likely to support the company's clean energy transition and reduce debt.

title: 2 Bear Market Stocks That Very Well Could Make You Richer
text: Regulated utilities provide reliable access to power and are given a government-monitored monopoly. Duke Energy is one of the largest regulated utilities in the U.S. and has an attractive 4.5% dividend yield.

title: Duke Energy sells commercial distributed generation business to ArcLight
text: Duke Energy Corp (NYSE:DUK) announced that it is selling its commercial distributed generation business to an affiliate of middle-market infrastructure investor ArcLight for an enterprise value of $364 million. The energy holding company said it will net about $259 million in proceeds from the transaction which will be used to strengthen its balance sheet and avoid having to issue additional debt securities or bonds associated with these assets.

title: Duke Energy to sell distributed generation portfolio in $364 mln deal
text: Utility firm Duke Energy said on Wednesday it would sell its commercial distributed generation business to private equity firm ArcLight Capital Partners in a $364 million deal.

title: Duke Energy to sell commercial distributed generation business to ArcLight for $364 million
text: Sale expected to close by year-end 2023 Transaction supports company's long-term regulated clean energy strategy CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) today announced it has reached an agreement to sell its commercial distributed generation business to an affiliate of ArcLight Capital Partners, LLC (collectively, "ArcLight"), a leading middle market infrastructure investor, for an enterprise value of $364 million, inclusive of non-controlling tax equity interests.

title: Duke Energy restores power for more than 250,000 customers across Indiana
text: Approximately 45,000 Indiana customers remain without power as of 12 p.m. today, as multiple waves of storms bring challenging and lengthy repairs.

title: Duke Energy power restoration progresses with more than 169,000 customers now back in service
text: Original storm affected more than 200,000 customers New storm system caused an additional 20,000 outages overnight Estimated restoration times are now posted for remaining customers PLAINFIELD, Ind. , July 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy crews continue to make progress bringing customers back to service from Thursday's powerful storms, with approximately 169,000 customers restored.
